name: Jun-Jae Won
department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
bio: Jun-Jae is a master's student in the Department of Applied Statistics at Gachon University. His research interests include biostatistics, survival analysis, causal inference, and microbiome data analysis, with a focus on developing statistical methods for high-dimensional biological data. He is involved in sTMAT, PRISM-AE, and NAFLD-CKD propensity score analysis projects.
